name: CONTRACT-BACKLOG-23
title: Track 1: add check-numbered-lists.py enforcement script + wire into Stop drift check
description:
CONTRACT-BACKLOG-19 Track 1. Add .claude/features/contract/scripts/enforcement/check-numbered-lists.py that rejects .md files using decimal sub-numbers (1.1, 1.2.3) or letter suffixes (1a, 1b) in ordered lists/headings. Plain 1. 2. 3. only.

Scope (in): .claude/features/**/docs/spec/*.md, .claude/features/**/skills/**/SKILL.md, .claude/features/**/agents/**/*.md, .claude/features/policy/*.md, .claude/features/contract/docs/**/*.md, top-level CLAUDE.md/README.md.

Scope (out): archive/**, docs/superpowers/**, bug-backlog-files branch content.

Patterns to flag:
  ^\s*#{1,6}\s+\d+\.\d+        # ## 2.6 Foo
  ^\s*#{1,6}\s+\d+[a-z]       # ## 3a Foo
  ^\s*[-*+]?\s*\d+\.\d+\.\s    # 1.2. ... list item
  ^\s*[-*+]?\s*\d+[a-z][.):]   # 3a) ... list item

Fix any current violations by rewriting to plain 1/2/3. Add an e2e test. Wire into contract test suite (test/run.py).
